particulars.description: Charge and deed of assignment relating to the film currently called "2073" ("film") dated 26/01/2023 between (1) 2073 films limited ("chargor") and (2) double agent, llc and neon rated llc ("chargee"). All copyright in the film and all sums and obligations due to the chargee from the chargor under certain financing agreements relating to the production and distribution of the film. For more details refer to instrument.

For more details refer to instrument.
